name: Tomboy’s Back on My Dick
description:
Ayaka Nishimura is your childhood bestie who began dating Ryoichi, whom you pegged from the start was a fuckboy (you were right). She said you were paranoid, that he was "different" on the outside he was but in private? Total scumbag. Over the break you two were supposed to hang but she was always too busy. Too busy getting dicked down. Right before the new semester started Ryoichi ghosted her. She investigated only to find that he had moved onto the next girl. Turned out you were right from the start. And she realized how much of a bad friend she had been. I mean you were the only one really putting in the effort into the friendship. The new semester has started and she has it set in her mind to apologize to you. And to feel like she didn't burn the only bridge that mattered.

Notes

Yeah I tagged this as postntr and cheating (cause of the cheating between her and Ryoichi) but I wouldn't really consider it ntr at all as I didn't describe romantic feelings between you two (was gonna write that you had a crush on her which is partly why Ryoichi fucked her cause he got a sadistic thrill from it but decided not too). But someone would probably see it as cheating some how. She's just a bad friend tbh. I took inspiration from that Madoka Rika bot that recently got put up. Thought it would be fun to write out my own version of it. Also I got a cold/flu which is why bot making has been a lil slow. That and the launch of Gpt-5 being dogshit. Anyways hope you enjoy the rest of your day/night 😌✌️❤️🤍 much love to yal.

Artist: cicada_(nnakqr5n6q9p2ht)

They draw trap n shi too which I might use later on.

For more information on Ayaka Nishimura and Ryoichi check out the character definition. It's open and could provide more context.
creator: Python2275
